full_text:
The tumor piece was quite small and fatty, there were no leftovers for others. I cut it into small pieces and separated around 30 small pieces for plating (see A). Dissociated the remaining using Collagenase/Hyaluronidase (#07912 StemCell technologies, aliquoted 25.10.23 MH). For 10 ml of enzymatic dissociation medium, I used 8,9 ml of AdF+++ medium (i.e. DMEM/F12 medium (supplemented with 1X glutamax, 10 mM HEPES, and pen/step), 1 ml C&H (10x to 1x), and 100 ul DNAse (RNase free). Incubated in +37C for 2 hours rotating; RBC lysis buffer 4 mL + 20 mL of AdF+++ medium. After centrifuge, cells were resuspended in 5 mL of the medium and counted.

Cell counts:

Cell count/ml 1):

total: 21.6 E6

live: 15.2 E6

viability: 70.4 %

size: 8.3 um

Cell count /ml 2):

total: 14.8 E6

live: 17.6 E6

viability: 70.9 %

size: 8.1 um

Cell count /ml 3):

total: 24.0 E6

live: 14.6 E6

viability: 61.0 %

size: 8.1 um

Average cell count/ml:

23.4 E6 cells/ml

Total cell count: 117 E6 cells

(23.4 E6 cells/ml x 5 ml)

Total volume: 5 mL

Overall # of cells in 5 mL was 117 E6

Cells were used for plating, freezing, flow cytometry and to establish 3D cultures. The rest was discarded.

Plating tissue pieces for fibroblast isolation

Plated small tissue pieces taken from different parts of the tumor tissue into 2 6 cm petri dishes. 12-15 pieces per plate. Added approx. 1 ml of AdF+++ medium + 10% FBS media per plate so that the tissue pieces do not float but the plate is covered with media.

Plating the cells

5 plates with 1 E6 cells per plate were plated in 10 cm petri dishes. For this aliquoted cell suspension was centrifuged and resuspended in 5 ml of AdF+++ medium + 10% FBS. 1 ml per plate of the cell suspension was added drop by drop to the plate containing 10 ml AdF+++ medium + 10% FBS media.

Freezing

4 cryotubes were frozen with each 5 E6 cells. For this aliquoted cell suspension was centrifuged, resuspended in 4 ml Stem Cell Banker, and aliquoted into 4 cryotubes.

FACS staining with fibroblast flow cytometry panel

11 aliquots with 0.5 E6 cells per tube were aliquoted for FACS staining.

For staining cells were aliquoted into 11 tubes:

2x multi color samples

unstained sample

FMO samples:

DCM FMO

CD45 FMO

EpCAM FMO

a-SMA FMO

CD29 FMO

CD31 FMO

PDGFR-b FMO

FAP FMO

Surface staining:

Added FACS buffer and centrifuged 400 g +4 C 6 min.

Made an antibody mix for the multicolor samples; 50µl per tube, diluted in Brilliant Stain buffer. For FMO samples, added the needed amount of Brilliant Stain buffer (see table below) to the cells and then added antibodies one by one to the tubes (containing the cells). For FMO samples, every other antibody was added except the corresponding one.

Incubated all samples 30 min at +4C and an additional 10 min RT. Washed and incubated for 40 min with Fixation buffer (#00-8222 Invitrogen) and added 1x permeabilization (10x perm (Invitrogen) buffer diluted in mQH2O) for 5 min. Centrifuged and resuspended the pellets in the FACS buffer for overnight storage at +4C.

Intracellular staining (next day, 16.7.2024):

Centrifuged the cells 400 g 6 min +4C and prepared the intracellular antibody mix:

15 µl APC a-SMA in 585 µl 1 x Permeabilization buffer.

Resuspended the pellet in 50 µl of intracellular antibody mix or only permeabilization buffer and incubated 30 min +4C shielded from light.

After incubation, washed the cells with 1 x Permeabilization buffer, centrifuged 400 g 6 min +4C, and resuspended the pellet in 400 µl FACS buffer. Pipeted the cell suspension through Falcon 5 ml polystyrene tube with a cell-strainer cap (blue).

Samples were kept on ice and protected from light until running at Fortessa.

Compensation beads:

Added 1 drop of both positive (BD CompBeads AntiMouse IgG, #51-90-9001229) and negative (CompBeads Negative Control #51-90-9001291) compensation beads to Falcon 5ml polystyrene round bottom tubes (white cap). To each compensation tube labeled for a single fluorochrome-conjugated antibody, added 1 ul of the corresponding antibody (see FC panel above for the antibodies, except DCM-BV510 was replaced with CD16-BV510). Compensation tubes were incubated approx. 45 min at +4 shielded from light before adding 350 ul FACS buffer.

3D organoid culture

Seed new organoid culture from freshly dissociated sample: S467_pOme_p0

6 million cells are needed in total from cell suspension.

- Aliquot a 15-ml falcon tube with 2E6 cells, another tube with 4E6 cells.

- Spin down at 1000 rpm, 5min, 4 C, then remove SN

- Add ~350 ul gel to each tube, mix and seed in 6-well plates (8 droplets in each well, 4 wells in total)

In detail:
The plan is to plate different seeding densities in the two different media (M1, M2), and observe organoid growth over time. 2 wells (M1 and M2) will be seeded with 1 million cells each according to the protocol, and the other 2 wells will be seeded with 2 million cells each (M1 and M2). All wells will be seeded with 8 droplets (20 ul / droplet).

Gel preparation:
 Cultrex stock concentration: 9.7mg/ml
 Working concentration: 7.5 mg/ml

Prepare gel dilution as follows:
 - for 16 droplets (2 wells) -> 
we need 320 ul gel solution -> 
prepare 350 ul gel solution (x2)

270 ul Cultrex BME + 80 ul PBS 

Prepare two eppendorf tubes with the above amount of gel solution and keep on ice before starting the experiment!

After the centrifugation of the 6x106 cells is complete, remove SN carefully and only leave the cell pellet. We have two tubes, one with 2 million cells (for 2 wells), one with 4 million cells (for 2 wells), seeding density is 1 and 2 million cells per well respectively.

Tube A: 2 million cells -> add 350ul of gel solution to the cell pellet and mix well without introducing bubbles -> seed 20ul droplets in 2 wells of a 6-well plate, 8 droplets per plate.
 Seeding density per well = 1,000,000 / 160 ul = 6,250 cells/ul

Tube B: 4 million cells -> add 350ul of gel solution to the cell pellet and mix well without introducing bubbles -> seed 20ul droplets in 2 wells of a 6-well plate, 8 droplets per plate.
 Seeding density per well = 2,000,000 / 160 ul = 12,500 cells/ul

- Incubate at 37 C for 45 minutes. After incubation, add 3 ml media per well:

o 2 wells with 3ml M1 each + ROCKi (1:2000, 3ul in 6ml)

o 2 wells with 3ml M2 each + ROCKi (1:2000, 3ul in 6ml)

Comments:

For the 2 wells with 1 million cells each, 8 droplets were seeded in each well and M1 / M2 media (+ROCKi) were added.

For the 2 wells with 2 million cells each, 7 droplets were seeded in each well and M1/M2 media (+ROCKi) were added. For this one, the gel was very hard to pipette despite resting on ice for ~15 minutes. There were many bubbles, so I am avoiding seeding droplets with many bubbles. In the end, one droplet from each well (the last ones) finally started to detach as there were already small bubbles that disrupted the gel, leaving 6 droplets each well in both media (M1,M2).
